Gain +1 [img:dex].

Gain +1 [img:con].

desc: Reduce the cost of ALL of your spells by 1 mana.

Gain +1 Thorns.

Gain +1 Magic Damage until end of turn.

desc: A stronger ranged attack that turns anything it kills into meat.

name: Minihook

name: Play Dead
desc: Down yourself. You don't get injured.

desc: Down yourself. You don't get injured. Revive at the end of the next round at full HP.

name: Reflect
desc: Reflect the next projectile that hits you back at the attacker.

desc: A lightning bolt that heals allies and has a chance to Stun enemies.

Gain +1 [img:spd].
